assignments.name: Lead_Count_Similar_Leads_with_Domains_Websites
assignments.label: Lead - Count Similar Leads with Domains Websites

Flow.description: MIS-7913 inaccessible accounts : get accounts MIS-5358 MIS-3309 Added Busines Unit MIS-2823
Flow.label: Accounts with Similar Domain - DataTable

recordLookups.description: gets Accounts with similar Website Domain OR Parent Company Domain
recordLookups.name: Get_Accounts_from_Account_data
recordLookups.label: Get Accounts from Account data
recordLookups.filterLogic: 8 AND 5 AND ((1 OR 2) AND 6) OR ((3 OR 4) AND 7)

recordLookups.description: Get Accounts with Similar Website OR Parent Company Domain to the current Lead data
recordLookups.name: Get_Accounts_from_Lead_data
recordLookups.label: Get Accounts from Lead data

recordLookups.name: Get_Contacts_with_Similar_Email_Domain
recordLookups.label: Get Contacts with Similar Email Domain

recordLookups.name: Get_Leads_with_Similar_Email_Domain
recordLookups.label: Get Leads with Similar Email Domain

fields.name: Contact_Information
fields.fieldText:
Full Name: {!Triggered_Contact.Name}

Email: {!Triggered_Contact.Email}

Title: {!Triggered_Contact.Title}

Phone: {!Triggered_Contact.Phone}

Pro User Type: {!Triggered_Contact.fr_Pro_User_Type__c}

﻿Last Pro Visit Date:

{!Triggered_Contact.fr_Last_Pro_Visit_Date__c}

Fit Score: {!Triggered_Contact.SW_Fit_Score__c}

How to contact:{!Triggered_Contact.how_to_contact_user_primary__c}

LinkedIn Profile: {!Triggered_Contact.LinkedIn_Profile__c}﻿

fields.name: Accounts_Counter_Screen_Display_Text
fields.fieldText:
Website Domain: {!Triggered_Account.Website_Domain__c}

Parent Company Domain: {!Triggered_Account.Parent_Company_Domain__c}


{!Number_Of_Similar_Accounts} Related Accounts Found

fields.name: Error_Display_Text
fields.fieldText:
There is a problem showing all the Accounts with a Similar Domain.

For more details please contact salesops@similarweb.com

fields.name: Lead_Information
fields.fieldText:
Name: {!Triggered_Lead.Name}

Email: {!Triggered_Lead.Email}

Phone: {!Triggered_Lead.Phone}

Current Registration Type:{!Triggered_Lead.Current_Registration_Type__c}

Fit Score: {!Triggered_Lead.SW_Fit_Score__c}

Title: {!Triggered_Lead.Title}

How to contact: {!Triggered_Lead.how_to_contact_user_primary__c}

LinkedIn Profile: {!Triggered_Lead.LinkedIn__c}

fields.name: Lead_Information2
fields.fieldText:
Company: {!Triggered_Lead.Company}

﻿Country: {!Triggered_Lead.Country}

SW Industry: {!Triggered_Lead.SW_Industry__c}

Visits over month:{!Triggered_Lead.Visits_over_time_monthly__c}

Intent Score: {!Triggered_Lead.Intent_Score__c}

fields.name: Leads_Counter_Screen_Display_Text
fields.fieldText:
Website Domain: {!Triggered_Lead.Website_Domain__c}


{!Number_Of_Similar_Accounts} Related Accounts Found


{!Number_of_similar_Contacts} Related Contacts and {!Number_Of_Similar_Leads} Related Leads Found
